questionHtml: Calculate the number of atoms per unit cell of gold, showing your working.
markschemeHtml:
1 2  «atom per face» × 6 «faces per cube» × 3 «atoms» AND 1 8  «atom per corner» × 8 «corners per cube» = 1 «atom» ✔

«atoms per unit cell = 3 + 1 =» 4 ✔

 

Award [1 max] for “4” without working shown.

meta.title: Calculate the number of atoms per unit cell of gold, showing your working.
